MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-10-294007 Conservatorship of Berta Loarca-Herrera and
PTR-18-301936 The Berta Loarca-Herrera Revocable Trust.

Appearances: Andrew Schultz appeared by zoom for Barbara De Vries.

The Court stated that it reviewed the Probate Examiner's notes and with a reduction of $720.00 from the Conservator's fees due to an error, it is prepared to take the matters under submission. The Fifth Account and Report of Conservators and Petition for Its Settlement, etc. and the First Account and Report of Trustee and Petition for Its Settlement, etc. are under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
